## Description

A clear description of the bug and what you expected to happen instead.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Start the platform with `.\tasks.ps1 dev` (or `make dev`)
2. Log in as `op_chen` / `operator123`
3. ...

## Actual Behavior

What happened.

## Expected Behavior

What should have happened.
